# Your next role, _found_.  Coached, introduced, and landed.

An AI agent that searches 14 million jobs daily, coaches you through interviews, and introduces you directly to hiring managers. Completely free.

Describe your dream job

Senior Product Designer at early-stage startup with product-market fit

[Hiring?Hiring? Meet Jill](https://app.jackandjill.ai/jill) Talk to Jack

Find jobs at companies like

See jobs in 10 minutes

Free

You control what gets shared

## Jack does everything you need to land your dream job.

### Job Search On Autopilot

Jack gets to know you through a conversation and searches 14 million jobs every day. You tell Jack yes or no, and he gets smarter about what you’re looking for with each response.

New matches

just now

![stripe](https://img.logo.dev/stripe.com?token=pk_LuntTYTKTm-nXPVQVWMcZw&size=48&format=png&theme=auto)

Principal Engineer

93%

Payments Infra · Remote · $320–400k

High-reliability systems

![huma](https://img.logo.dev/huma.com?token=pk_LuntTYTKTm-nXPVQVWMcZw&size=48&format=png&theme=auto)

Head of Engineering

96%

Series B Healthtech · London · £160–220k

Scaling eng orgs 10–40

![anthropic](https://img.logo.dev/anthropic.com?token=pk_LuntTYTKTm-nXPVQVWMcZw&size=48&format=png&theme=auto)

Engineering Lead

91%

AI Safety · SF · $300–380k

ML infra + team leadership

![vercel](https://img.logo.dev/vercel.com?token=pk_LuntTYTKTm-nXPVQVWMcZw&size=48&format=png&theme=auto)

Staff Engineer

94%

Frontend Platform · Remote · $280–350k

Next.js + edge infra

![monzo](https://img.logo.dev/monzo.com?token=pk_LuntTYTKTm-nXPVQVWMcZw&size=48&format=png&theme=auto)

Senior Backend Engineer

98%

Digital Banking · London · £130–180k

Distributed systems + fintech

### Introductions to Hiring Managers

When Jack finds a match in Jill’s network, he introduces you directly to the hiring manager. No applications. No waiting. Warm introductions to people who already want to meet you.

Introduction

today at 5:47pm

![Jack](https://www.jackandjill.ai/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fjack-photo.webp&w=256&q=90&dpl=dpl_DAC3r2shE4WPUgymEYiiMm8dbFRB)

Jack made an introduction

Marcus, CTO at Acme, wants to chat about the Founding Engineer role. He liked your distributed systems experience.

Founding Engineer$180–240kLondon

Accept Introduction

![](https://www.jackandjill.ai/images/cursors/default-cursor.svg)

Skipped applicationDirect to CTO2 day process

### Mock Interviews

Run a mock interview with Jack and get specific feedback on your stories, clarity, and answers to the hard questions. You’ll walk in with a tighter narrative and fewer surprises.

0:00

Jack

Tell me about a technical migration you led under time pressure.

0:02

Iledasix-weekmigrationof40servicesinthreephases.Wealignedstakeholdersearlyandshippedtwodaysaheadwithzerodowntime.

Confidence score0%

Strong: Clear structure, specific metrics

Improve: Add stakeholder conflict detail

### Salary Benchmarking

Jack shows you what ‘good’ looks like for your role, level, and location based on thousands of real jobs to inform your negotiation.

Salary Benchmark

Market 50th$155k

Your target$105k

![](https://www.jackandjill.ai/images/cursors/default-cursor.svg)

Market 90th$220k

Base

$155k

Equity

$40k

Bonus

$15k

Based on Senior Engineer roles in London, Series A-B startups.

### Career Clarity Coaching

Jack helps you get clear on what you want next, what you’re great at, and what kind of work will actually fulfil you. In one coaching call, you’ll shape your career plan with Jack’s help.

0:00

Jack

I’ve been a senior engineer for 3 years. Should I push for Staff or move into management?

That’s the right question to ask at this stage.

Let’s compare both paths: compensation, day-to-day work, and long-term fit.

First, what energised you more this year: technical problem-solving or people leadership?

### Salary Negotiation Coaching

Jack helps you build a negotiation plan with data and specific language you can use. Know when to push, what to ask for, and how to respond without damaging the relationship.

0:00

Jack

Call Ended0:00

Redial Jack

Employer

“We can offer $128,000 base salary.”

J

J

Jack

Below P50. Counter at $148k: they’ve run 4 rounds, they won’t walk.

You said

$148,000

Accepted

+$20,000

## Why Jack exists

Findinganewjobfeelslikeafull-timejob.RecruitersfloodyourinboxwithirrelevantrolesandbythetimeajobhitsLinkedIn,400peoplehavealreadyapplied.Jackchangesthegame.He’sanAIagentwhogetstoknowyouandscanseveryjobonearth,everyday.Whenhefindsanunmissableopportunity,hehelpsyoulandit.

## Land your dream job in 5 simple steps.

Step 01

### Tell Jack what you’re looking for

A 10-minute conversation is all it takes. Jack asks the right questions to understand what good looks like for you.

Step 02

### Jack searches while you sleep

14 million jobs searched daily. Not just keyword matches. Jack looks for genuine step ups you’d never find yourself.

Step 03

### Jack brings you the best matches

Tell him what feels right and what doesn’t. He refines and keeps searching until there’s a genuine match.

Step 04

### Jack prepares you to land the role

Mock interviews, salary negotiation, CV feedback. All tailored to you and the specific role you’re going for.

Step 05

### Start doing your best work

Direct introductions to hiring managers. No applications. No waiting.

### Ready to get started?

Talk to Jack for 10 minutes and see your first matches. No sign-up required.

[Talk to Jack](https://app.jackandjill.ai/jack)

## No risk. No cost.

Jack is completely free to use.

**Within 10 minutes**, you see every unmissable job opportunity.

**No spam**. Jack only brings you roles worth seeing, never irrelevant opportunities.

**Stop anytime**. No contracts, no commitments. If Jack isn't helpful, just stop working with him.

**Remarkably helpful.** Career coaching worth $300/hour, completely free.

Your Plan

Everything included

Job Search On AutopilotIncluded

Introductions to Hiring ManagersIncluded

Career ClarityIncluded

Salary BenchmarkingIncluded

Salary Negotiation CoachingIncluded

Mock InterviewsIncluded

Monthly cost$0

Companies pay when they hire through Jill.

Why is Jack free?

Jack’s mission is to give everyone unimaginably good career support, not just those who’ve already made it. When Jack introduces you to a company through Jill’s network and you get hired, the company pays a fee. Career coaching normally costs $300/hour. Jack gives everyone the same support for free. No catch. No hidden fees. Completely free.
